title: 🔁 Feedback Loops (Nonlinear Systems)
name: Feedback Loops (Nonlinear Systems)
what_it_is: Systems where the output loops back into the input—amplifying, mutating, or stabilizing behaviors. Chaos emerges when feedback gets wild.
how_to_use: her voice triggers feedback visuals: sound pulses build into geometric bloom
cloak that evolves via nonlinear feedback—folds deepen as motion repeats
animation_behavior: Reacts to motion or sound, visuals build over time, unstable feedback pulses ---
